title: EDUCATION TEAM - 211info
text: DIRECTION SERVICE EDUCATION TEAM Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides case managment services. Can assist with education-based questions or concerns, resource navigation, meeting preparations, and call-in consultations. 1144 Gateway Loop Suite 200 Springfield, OR 97477 Eligibility: Youth and or families, ages 0-23 with an education plan (IEP/504), suspected disability, behavioral challenges, neurologically diverse, complex medical needs, or special education services Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-4:30pm Email (541) 686-5060 . Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 686-5060 Angela Holt [email protected] Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Visit website, call, or email for more information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None required at intake LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: Lane County Services: Case/Care Management * Children and Youth With Disabilities/Health Conditions Other Services Offered At This Location: INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - WRAPAROUND FACILITATION WITH PEER SUPPORT INFORMATION SERVICES - INFORMATION AND REFERRAL INFORMATION SERVICES - NATIONAL CENTER FOR APPROPRIATE DISPUTE RESOLUTION IN SPECIAL EDUCATION MENTAL HEALTH SUPPORT SERVICES - PEER SUPPORT If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. DIRECTION SERVICE
